exploration_notes: To implement `rolling_median`, the key files are: (1) `numpy/lib/_function_base_impl.py` — the primary reference for how `median` and other array functions are implemented with `array_function_dispatch`, including import patterns (`functools.partial(overrides.array_function_dispatch, module='numpy')`), `__all__` exports, and NumPy-style docstrings; (2) `numpy/_core/overrides.py` — defines `array_function_dispatch` decorator used for NEP-18 dispatch protocol; (3) `numpy/lib/__init__.py` — where n
